Riverton College - Program Requirements
Bachelor of Business Administration, catalog 2023
124 total credits required. Minimum GPA 2.5.

Business Core: ACCT 201 Financial Accounting (3), ECON 101 Microeconomics (3),
BUSN 301 Business Statistics (3, prereq MATH 120).
Global Perspective: 3 credits - choose one of HIST 220, INTL 310, SPAN 201.
Senior requirement: capstone proposal approved by advisor (milestone).

Transfer credit accepted: Fall 2022  ECON 101  T  3 credits
Completed: Spring 2023  ACCT 201  A-  3 credits
